home.title: Velkommen til price|manager
home.description: Dette er startsiden. Her er nogle genveje til listesiderne:

groups.title: Grupper
groups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected groups?

appPermissions.title: App Permissions
appPermissions.dangerWarning: Editing or deleting permissions can lock users out of the application. Proceed only if you have a superuser available and understand the impact.
appPermissions.deleteWarning: Deleting this permission can break application access. Continue?
appPermissions.deleteSelectedWarning: Deleting {{count}} permission(s) can break application access. Continue?

appRoles.title: App Roles
appRoles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected app roles?

serviceInitialization.title: Serviceinitialisering
serviceInitialization.description: Initialiser servicedata manuelt. Vælg de data, du vil indlæse, og klik på knappen Indlæs data.
serviceInitialization.essentialDataDescription: Kerndata krævet for at tjenesten kan fungere (sprog, valutaer, lande, enheder, skatteklasser, tilladelser, roller)
serviceInitialization.sampleDataDescription: Stikprøvedata til test og demonstration (organisationer, grupper, kanaler, prisrækker)
serviceInitialization.refreshPermissionsHint: Indlæs dine tilladelser igen efter indlæsning af nye data
